summary: Iteration 69: Shadow Sniper + Config Hard-Pin + Arb Reduction COMPLETE. All 26 backend tests passed. Verified: (1) Risk config hard-pinned at startup: arb_max_exposure=8, arb_reserved_capital=8, max_arb_positions=5, max_position_size=25, crypto_max_exposure=250, weather_reserved_capital=15 (NEW), (2) Shadow sniper API endpoints all working: /api/shadow/report (comparison data with live/shadow sections), /api/shadow/evaluations (ev_ratio, stoikov_edge_bps, ev_pass, stoikov_pass fields), /api/shadow/positions (6 hypothetical positions), /api/shadow/closed (empty list initially), (3) Shadow sniper fully isolated from live production - 150 evaluations, 20 shadow-would-trade signals, 0 live fills, (4) SLOT_ROTATION added to selective auto-exit whitelist (line 1718), (5) Dedup logging for slot rotation (10-min cooldown per position, line 1806), (6) Stale arb cleanup: CLEANUP_INTERVAL_HOURS=2, STALE_THRESHOLD_HOURS=24.

backend_health: GET /api/ returns 200 with app info - PASS
shadow_sniper_report: Report has comparison.live and comparison.shadow - PASS
Report has config with min_ev_ratio, gamma, inventory_decay - PASS
shadow_sniper_evaluations: Returns list of evaluation records - PASS
Records have: live_decision, shadow_would_trade, ev_ratio, stoikov_edge_bps, ev_pass, stoikov_pass - PASS
shadow_sniper_positions: Returns list of hypothetical positions (6 positions) - PASS
shadow_sniper_closed: Returns list (empty initially as expected) - PASS
shadow_isolation: Shadow sniper fully isolated - no live fills produced - PASS
stale_arb_cleanup: Backend starts with stale_arb_cleanup service (2h interval, 24h threshold) - PASS
controls_endpoint: GET /api/controls shows exposure_caps with arb=8, arb_reserved=8 - PASS

risk_config_hard_pin.description: All risk config values hard-pinned at startup migration

stale_arb_cleanup.description: Stale arb cleanup service with 24h threshold and 2h interval

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 69 validated shadow sniper layer and config hard-pin changes. Key points: (1) Risk config now has arb_max_exposure=8, arb_reserved_capital=8, max_arb_positions=5 (REDUCED from 25/25/10 in iteration 68), weather_reserved_capital=15 (NEW), (2) Shadow sniper at /api/shadow/* evaluates same markets as live crypto sniper with EV-gap + Stoikov filters but produces NO live fills, (3) SLOT_ROTATION is now in selective auto-exit whitelist alongside MARKET_COLLAPSE, PROFIT_CAPTURE, NEGATIVE_EDGE, TIME_INEFFICIENCY, (4) Stale arb cleanup runs every 2h checking for positions >24h old with negative PnL.
